arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool handed huge £83m Barcelona boost in Alexander Isak pursuit?
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly not in a financial position to sign Newcastle United star Alexander Isak, boosting the hopes of Arsenal and Liverpool in landing the Swede.

Szczesny; Kounde, Cubarsí, Iñigo, Balde; De Jong, Pedri; Yamal, Olmo, Raphinha; Lewandowski Barça get some very good news for this one as captain Ronald Araujo makes it back in time from the ankle injury he suffered against Sevilla last weekend, and adds depth to a defense still missing Andreas Christensen due to a calf problem.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Rayo Vallecano – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona host Rayo Vallecano this evening knowing a win will take them back to the top of the La Liga table. Dropped points for Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid over the weekend has opened the door for Hansi Flick’s side to regain top spot. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Sporting Director confirms they are out of race for Barcelona target
arts.sum: Barcelona and Bayern Munich have been the two clubs most closely linked with Bayer Leverkusen central defender Jonathan Tah, who is out of contract at the end of the season. Able to sign a precontract, Tah is looking for a move in the summer, but Bayern are unlikely to be his destination. De Jong convinced by the project and by Flick to renew with Barça - Mundo Deportivo Barça coach admits going top again would be great for the team's confidence, but that there's still a long way to go and that working and improving is most important.

arts.ttl: Neymar and his dad discuss Brazilian’s future amid Barca return rumors
arts.sum: Neymar was also asked about his future and explained why he hasn’t signed a long contract with the club. I didn’t sign a long contract because I didn’t know how I was going to return, how I was going to feel in those months.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak: Arsenal, Barcelona, Chelsea & Liverpool learn Newcastle's asking price
arts.sum: Newcastle United are demanding a record-breaking sum for their star striker Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Barcelona to be edged out with £83m striker bid?
arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly prepared to make an approach worth £83m to secure a deal for one of European football's most highly-regarded forwards in the summer.

arts.ttl: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick responds to 'disrespect' after Jude Bellingham red card for Real Madrid
arts.sum: England international dismissed for comments made to referee
